project.name: ${project.groupId}:${project.artifactId}
project.description: Custom jOOQ generator used by graphitron-fixtures to emit NodeId-metadata constants (__NODE_TYPE_ID / __NODE_KEY_COLUMNS) on specific fixture tables. Models what Sikt's KjerneJooqGenerator does in production so the rewrite's classifier is exercised against actual generator output rather than a hand-edited approximation. Lives in its own module because the jOOQ-codegen-maven plugin runs in generate-sources, before the consuming module's own classes are compiled — the generator class must be on the plugin's classpath as a dependency.
